results.rendered_html:
2. cātura (von catura)
1〉 adj.
a〉 geschickt, gewandt  ŚABDAR. _im_ ŚKDR. 
— b〉 Schmeicheleien sagend.
— c〉 dem Auge zugänglich  H. an. 3,553 .  MED. r. 154 .
— d〉 lenkend, regierend  MED.  Vgl. cāturika.
— 2〉 m. ein rundes Kopfkissen  TRIK. 2,6,41 .  H. an.   MED.  Vgl. gallacāturī.
— 3〉 f. [Page2-0987] ī = cāturya  SIDDH. K. 250,a,7 .  VOP. 4,12 . Geschicklichkeit (lies: dākṣya)  MED.

results.rendered_html:
cātura a. (rī f.) [catura eva svārthe aṇ]
1 Relating to four.
2 Clever, able, shrewd.
3 Speaking well, flattering.
4 Drawn by four (as a carriage).
5 Governing, ruling.
6 Visible, perceptible.
— raḥ A small round pillow.
— raṃ A four-wheeled carriage.
— rī Skill, dexterity, ability; tadbhaṭacāturīturī  N. 1. 12.
